focus: code-domain retrieval (real TypeScript/Bun/Prisma/Stripe error messages and file paths), not natural-language text

retrieval-quality.test.ts.notes: 100 realistic code entries: 30 error_pattern, 25 convention, 20 decision, 15 learning, 10 ghost. Real production errors (Prisma P2002, ECONNREFUSED 5432, Stripe webhook raw body, JWT expiry, Redis EHOSTUNREACH, ESM .js extension).

suites: error propagation dev→dev (5 tests) — Dev A learns Stripe raw-body error, Dev B finds it in top-3 BM25 + file-path
convention sharing (6 tests) — Dev A writes zod validation convention, Devs B/C/D all find it via different phrasings
ghost knowledge propagation (8 tests) — 5 devs each find ghost entry above 20 noise, confidence stays 1.0, status stays active
personal scope privacy (11 tests) — 3 devs with personal+team entries, developerId-filtered BM25 proves strict isolation
budget tier ranking consistency (8 tests) — top-1 at ultraMinimal matches top-1 at full, noise suppressed
transport-agnostic learn→recall (5 tests) — stdio and HTTP inserts both surface regardless of sourceTool
self-hosted LLM tight budget (4 tests) — 800-token budget returns ≤2 entries, token count respected
budget boundary edge cases (12 tests) — 4999/5000/2000/0 boundaries, empty-list sentinel
cross-tool.test.ts.notes: fetchEntries helper bridges searchByBM25 (returns {id,score,source}) to formatForContext (needs FormattableEntry) via single SELECT IN query.

suites: supersession (4 tests) — newer JWT decision ranks above older via higher term frequency, older preserved
contradiction/duplicate detection (5 tests) — findDuplicate by fingerprint, mergeEntries sums sourceCount and unions tags/files immutably
decay + reinforcement (6 tests) — error_pattern 30d half-life, decision 365d, convention near-zero decay, ghost infinite decay, sourceCount saturation boost
new hire onboarding (7 tests) — 50 entries across 10 domains, 5 queries each return ≥3 hits, ≥15 unique entries surfaced aggregate
3 developers parallel feature development (60 ops) — Promise.all-driven devs own payments/auth/db-layer domains
simultaneous learn race dedup (4 tests) — normalized error signature catches line-number variants as duplicates
500 read query P50/P95 latency — P50 11.1ms, P95 16.6ms on 200-entry in-memory DB
